title: BEHAVIORAL HEALTH SERVICES - 211info
text: KLAMATH OPEN DOOR BEHAVIORAL HEALTH SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides behavioral health services, which include treatment for depression, loss, trauma, anxiety, phobia, stress, family problems, substance abuse or addiction and other behavioral health problems. Services include: individual, family, and group counseling, medication evaluation and management, psychological testing, and assistance in accessing community resources. 2074 S 6th Street Klamath Falls, OR 97601 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 7am-6pm. 1st, 3rd, and 5th Wednesdays of the month closed from noon-2pm. Email (541) 851-8110 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main (541) 851-8110 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for information and to schedule an appointment FEES: Accepts OHP, Medicare, and most private insurance. Sliding scale fees available. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable. Income information for those applying for sliding scale fees. LANGUAGES: English, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Klamath and Lake Counties Services: Bereavement and Grief Counseling Family Counseling Group Counseling Individual Counseling Psychiatric Medication Services Substance Use Disorder Counseling Other Services Offered At This Location: HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - OREGON MOTHERSCARE OUTPATIENT HEALTH FACILITIES - HEALTH CARE SERVICES SPECIALTY MEDICINE - DENTAL CARE SERVICES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. KLAMATH OPEN DOOR
